body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nested Agency** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nested agency — voluntary action, free will as constructed experience, intentional binding.
**Phase context:** Sense of agency — voluntary action, free will as constructed experience, intentional binding.

**BOLD signal variability as potential new biomarker of functional neurological disorders.** — Neuroimage Clin (2024). DOI: 10.1016/j.nicl.2024.103625. PMID: 38833899. BACKGROUND: Functional neurological disorder (FND) is a common neuropsychiatric condition with established diagnostic criteria and effective treatments but for which the underlying neuropathophysiological mechanisms remain incompletely understood. Recent neuroimaging studies have revealed FND as a multi-network brain disorder, unveiling alterations across limbic, self-agency, attentional/salience, and sensorimotor networks.
